archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Cinematic, Moody, Premium Aviation)
design_philosophy: Embrace the cold, atmospheric beauty of Iceland. Deep midnight blues, icy whites, and subtle aurora accents. The design should feel premium, spacious, and highly cinematic, avoiding typical gaming community clutter. Prioritize large typography, bento grids with glassmorphic cards, and high-impact negative space.

typography.import_instruction: Add Google Fonts imports for Outfit (weights 300,400,500,700) and Manrope (weights 400,500,600) to the main CSS.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento grid (Mode A) for the fleet showcase, utilizing asymmetric col-spans (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4).

header.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#030C1A]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

buttons.primary: bg-white text-[#030C1A] font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/40 transition-all duration-300
buttons.vamsys_cta: bg-brand-navy border border-accent/30 text-white font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:border-accent shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(80,180,216,0.3)] transition-all flex items-center gap-2

cards.fleet_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-3xl group hover:bg-white/[0.05] transition-all duration-500
cards.fleet_image: w-full h-full object-cover opacity-60 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-700

marquee.classes: text-8xl md:text-[10rem] font-black uppercase text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-b from-white/5 to-transparent whitespace-nowrap select-none

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Background image with heavy overlay. Content bottom-left aligned.

content.title: THE SPIRIT OF ICELAND, VIRTUALLY.
content.subtitle: Connecting the world through MSFS & X-Plane via VAMSYS.

sections.image_description: Beautiful northern lights illuminating Reykjavík night sky. Apply bg-black/50 overlay.
sections.effects: Parallax scroll on background image if possible.

sections.name: About Mission
sections.layout: Asymmetric split layout. Image offset, overlapping a text block.

content.title: BORN IN THE NORTH
content.description: vIcelandAir brings the chill of the North Atlantic to your simulator. Whether you're flying the demanding approach into Keflavík or cruising the auroras en route to North America, we simulate the premium commercial and cargo operations of Iceland's flagship carrier.

sections.image_description: Severe landscape of glacier snout spreading to seacoast. Represents the atmospheric, cold environment.

sections.name: Operations Showcase
sections.layout: Side-by-side or stacked bento grid cards contrasting Passenger and Cargo.

commercial.title: PASSENGER
commercial.desc: Connecting Europe and North America via our Keflavík hub.

cargo.title: CARGO
cargo.desc: Night ops and heavy freight across the Atlantic.

sections.name: Fleet Grid
sections.layout: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris grid). Wide gaps, mixing span sizes.

sections.name: Sim Platforms Marquee
sections.layout: Full width marquee section bridging content.
sections.style: Use react-fast-marquee. Text styling: text-4xl font-light tracking-widest text-white/30

sections.name: Footer
sections.layout: Massive bottom padding (py-32). High contrast logo/type at the bottom.

content.disclaimer: vIcelandAir is a virtual airline for flight simulation purposes only. We are not affiliated with the real-world Icelandair Group.

icons.usage: Use icons for Sim badges (e.g., Plane, Globe, Cloud, Wind) and external links (ExternalLink icon for VAMSYS).

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-vamsys-cta', data-testid='nav-about-link').

technical_notes.framework: React (Vite) + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion (optional, but highly recommended for entrance animations and bento card hover states)
technical_notes.styling: Avoid using Shadcn cards. Use raw HTML div/section with the provided Tailwind classes to achieve the overlapping and asymmetric designs. Utilize glassmorphism effectively with 'backdrop-blur' classes.
